runs.text: Competability Methodology | The outsourced pool is cleaned, split into non-overlapping work-type lanes, and filtered through four structural tests to a named target list

runs.text: Every dollar appears once: the lanes are mutually exclusive and together cover the whole addressable pool, so nothing is counted twice and nothing is dropped silently.

text_body.plain_text: Every dollar appears once: the lanes are mutually exclusive and together cover the whole addressable pool, so nothing is counted twice and nothing is dropped silently.

runs.text: Structure over narrative: subaward filings carry no usable work descriptions, so the tests read market structure — who shares the work, who is entering, how often the buy recurs — not award text.

text_body.plain_text: Structure over narrative: subaward filings carry no usable work descriptions, so the tests read market structure — who shares the work, who is entering, how often the buy recurs — not award text.
